g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the dB spectrum component feed into the RL state vector?')
sendPrompt('Why include the error spectrum directly in the state rather than computing it implicitly?')
sendPrompt('What filter parameters should be part of the internal state in the RL formulation?')
sendPrompt('Why does adding delta E(f) between timesteps help the RL agent learn faster?')
sendPrompt('How does a step counter help prevent the RL agent from oscillating near convergence?')
sendPrompt('Should the RL action be absolute EQ gains or delta adjustments per band?')
sendPrompt('What is the advantage of using delta actions versus absolute filter settings in acoustic RL?')
sendPrompt('How do I compute the spectral error reward term from the FFT output?')
sendPrompt('Why add a smoothness penalty on filter weight changes to the reward function?')
sendPrompt('What convergence bonus value works well and when should it trigger?')
sendPrompt('What are good convergence thresholds for ending an RL episode in acoustic compensation?')
sendPrompt('What RL algorithm works best for continuous action spaces like this — TD3, SAC, or PPO?')
